title: [MVP] Bootstrap Hexagonal architecture and DI composition root
body:
## User Story
As a Concoction maintainer, I want a clean Hexagonal architecture with DI so that adapters and core logic evolve independently.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Solution contains Domain/Application/Infrastructure/Cli projects
- Composition root resolves orchestrator service
- Domain/Application do not reference Infrastructure

title: [MVP] Implement schema discovery canonical model
body:
## User Story
As a data engineer, I want canonical schema metadata discovery so that generation respects table structure.

## Acceptance Criteria
- DatabaseSchema/TableSchema/ColumnSchema models finalized
- ISchemaProvider async discovery with cancellation
- SQL type mapping reports unsupported kinds

title: [MVP] Add PostgreSQL and SQLite providers
body:
## User Story
As an engineer, I want PostgreSQL and SQLite adapters so Concoction works in common dev and CI environments.

## Acceptance Criteria
- PostgreSQL and SQLite providers implemented
- Canonical metadata parity for fixture schema
- Integration tests cover both providers

title: [MVP] Build generator registry and deterministic randomness
body:
## User Story
As a tester, I want deterministic seeded generators so datasets are reproducible.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Typed generator dispatch abstraction exists
- Registry supports strategy-based lookups
- Same seed produces stable output

title: [MVP] Implement constraints, dependency planning, and referential materialization
body:
## User Story
As a QA engineer, I want constraints and referential integrity preserved so test failures reflect real defects.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Nullability/uniqueness/range/enum checks implemented
- Topological plan with cycle diagnostics
- FK values map to existing parent keys

title: [MVP] Add rules DSL, CLI commands, and exporters
body:
## User Story
As a developer, I want CLI-driven generation with config overrides and export formats so Concoction fits CI/local workflows.

## Acceptance Criteria
- JSON/YAML rule config with validation and precedence merge
- discover/generate/validate/export commands available
- CSV/JSON outputs and summary report generated

title: [MVP] Add sensitive field policies and issue bootstrap workflow
body:
## User Story
As a compliance-focused maintainer, I want default-safe sensitive policies and automated issue creation from manifest.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Sensitive field classifier assigns safe default strategy
- Compliance decisions emitted in run metadata
- GitHub Action creates/updates manifest issues idempotently
